creative_brief: Clean layout with emphasis on the time stamps (2pm, 5pm) and scarcity moments. Use countdown-style visual elements.
subject: Last week we only had 3 hours left
preheader: Then we sold out completely. Here's why it keeps happening.
body:
Last Thursday at 2pm, Rachel called me in a panic.

"We've got 12 beef orders left, but only enough grass-fed cattle for 9 families."

By 5pm? Completely sold out. Again.

This is the third time this month we've run out of Rachel's pasture-raised beef before Friday. Her cattle graze on regenerative land on the northern NSW coast — no feedlots, no shortcuts — but that means limited supply.

The supermarkets can promise endless stock because they source from anywhere. We can't. When Rachel's cattle aren't ready, we wait. When her quota is met, we're done.

That's why we're building something bigger. More partner farms. Larger cold storage. A proper system that can handle the demand without compromising on where your food comes from.

But we need your backing first.

Join our VIP waitlist with a $5 refundable deposit. You'll get first access when we launch our equity crowdfunding campaign, plus priority ordering when we open the Brookvale hub.

No more missing out.

This is not financial advice. Consider seeking independent financial advice. Full details in the disclosure document on Birchal.
